title: Backpets
description: Bring companionship and utility to your adventures in Backpets!
body:
![Backpets](https://bobophones.github.io/img/logo/backpets.png)

# Bring companionship and utility to your adventures with the Backpets mod!
Adventure is better with companions who carry your load! Backpets introduces creatures that act as living backpacks, following their owner faithfully across the world.

Features:
- Find backpet in the pillagers' cage in the world
- Feed backpets with chests
- Color them in any of the 16 vanilla colors
- Craft armor from phantom membranes to protect backpets
- They can catch some players' projectiles
- Put on a record near them so they start dancing

![Backpets!](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/backpets_0.png)
